title: 6 Months Free with 18 Month Subscription of Sonatype Nexus Repository Cloud
description: Up to 500gb/month free for the first 6 months with a minimum 18-month subscription purchase made before June 30, 2026.

value: 6 Months Free with 18 Month Subscription of Sonatype Nexus Repository Cloud
